globalControls.label: Particles
globalControls.description: Number of particles in the animated trail — more creates a denser, fuller trail.

globalControls.label: Trail
globalControls.description: How long the particle trail appears — longer trails create smoother, more continuous paths.

globalControls.label: Loop
globalControls.description: Duration of one full animation loop cycle — controls the overall animation speed.

globalControls.label: Pulse
globalControls.description: Speed of the breathing/pulse modulation — how fast the shape expands and contracts.

curves.name: Original Thinking
curves.description: The base circle is carved by a sevenfold cosine term, so the trail blooms into a rotating seven-petal ring.

controls.label: Base radius
controls.description: Radius of the base circle that the curve orbits around.

controls.label: Detail
controls.description: Amplitude of the inner cosine term that carves the petal details.

controls.label: Petals
controls.description: Number of petals or lobes in the rose curve — higher values create denser patterns.

controls.label: Scale
controls.description: Overall scaling factor for the curve — larger values stretch the curve wider.

curves.name: Thinking Five
curves.description: Replacing the sevenfold term with a fivefold term reduces the inner loops, giving the curve a cleaner five-petal rhythm.

controls.label: Base radius
controls.description: Radius of the base circle that the curve orbits around.

controls.label: Detail
controls.description: Amplitude of the inner cosine term that carves the petal details.

controls.label: Petals
controls.description: Number of petals or lobes in the rose curve — higher values create denser patterns.

controls.label: Scale
controls.description: Overall scaling factor for the curve — larger values stretch the curve wider.

curves.name: Thinking Nine
curves.description: A ninefold term packs more inner turns into the same orbit, so the floral ring feels denser and more finely braided.

controls.label: Base radius
controls.description: Radius of the base circle that the curve orbits around.

controls.label: Detail
controls.description: Amplitude of the inner cosine term that carves the petal details.

controls.label: Petals
controls.description: Number of petals or lobes in the rose curve — higher values create denser patterns.

controls.label: Scale
controls.description: Overall scaling factor for the curve — larger values stretch the curve wider.

curves.name: Rose Orbit
curves.description: The radius expands and contracts with cos(7t), so the orbit breathes as it spins.

controls.label: Base radius
controls.description: Base radius of the orbiting rose curve.

controls.label: Detail
controls.description: Amplitude of the modulating cosine that creates the petal shape.

controls.label: k
controls.description: The k parameter in cos(kθ) — controls the number of lobes.

controls.label: Scale
controls.description: Overall scaling factor for the curve.

curves.name: Rose Curve
curves.description: Using r = a cos(5t) creates five evenly spaced lobes, the breathing modulation gives them a living pulse.

controls.label: a
controls.description: The "a" parameter in r = a cos(kθ) — sets the base size of the rose.

controls.label: a boost
controls.description: Sinusoidal modulation on "a" — adds organic variation to the radius.

controls.label: Base pulse
controls.description: Base breathing value — the minimum scale of the pulse animation.

controls.label: Pulse boost
controls.description: Amplitude of the breathing pulse — how much the shape expands and contracts.

controls.label: k
controls.description: The "k" parameter in r = a cos(kθ) — controls the number of lobes.

controls.label: Scale
controls.description: Overall scaling factor for the curve.

curves.formula:
r(t) = (roseA + roseABoost × sin(t)) × cos(roseK × t) × (roseBreathBase + roseBreathBoost × sin(pulseTime))
x(t) = r(t) × cos(t) × roseScale + 50
y(t) = r(t) × sin(t) × roseScale + 50

curves.name: Rose Two
curves.description: With k = 2, the cosine radius forms broad opposing petals, the breathing adds life.

controls.label: a
controls.description: The "a" parameter in r = a cos(kθ) — sets the base size of the rose.

controls.label: a boost
controls.description: Sinusoidal modulation on "a" — adds organic variation to the radius.

controls.label: Base pulse
controls.description: Base breathing value — the minimum scale of the pulse animation.

controls.label: Pulse boost
controls.description: Amplitude of the breathing pulse — how much the shape expands and contracts.

controls.label: Scale
controls.description: Overall scaling factor for the curve.

curves.formula:
r(t) = (roseA + roseABoost × sin(t)) × cos(2 × t) × (roseBreathBase + roseBreathBoost × sin(pulseTime))
x(t) = r(t) × cos(t) × roseScale + 50
y(t) = r(t) × sin(t) × roseScale + 50

curves.name: Rose Three
curves.description: With k = 3, the curve resolves into three rotating petals, the breathing modulation gives a living pulse.

controls.label: a
controls.description: The "a" parameter in r = a cos(kθ) — sets the base size of the rose.

controls.label: a boost
controls.description: Sinusoidal modulation on "a" — adds organic variation to the radius.

controls.label: Base pulse
controls.description: Base breathing value — the minimum scale of the pulse animation.

controls.label: Pulse boost
controls.description: Amplitude of the breathing pulse — how much the shape expands and contracts.

controls.label: Scale
controls.description: Overall scaling factor for the curve.

curves.formula:
r(t) = (roseA + roseABoost × sin(t)) × cos(3 × t) × (roseBreathBase + roseBreathBoost × sin(pulseTime))
x(t) = r(t) × cos(t) × roseScale + 50
y(t) = r(t) × sin(t) × roseScale + 50

curves.name: Rose Four
curves.description: With k = 4, the petals settle into a balanced cross-like rose, the breathing gives it life.

controls.label: a
controls.description: The "a" parameter in r = a cos(kθ) — sets the base size of the rose.

controls.label: a boost
controls.description: Sinusoidal modulation on "a" — adds organic variation to the radius.

controls.label: Base pulse
controls.description: Base breathing value — the minimum scale of the pulse animation.

controls.label: Pulse boost
controls.description: Amplitude of the breathing pulse — how much the shape expands and contracts.

controls.label: Scale
controls.description: Overall scaling factor for the curve.

curves.formula:
r(t) = (roseA + roseABoost × sin(t)) × cos(4 × t) × (roseBreathBase + roseBreathBoost × sin(pulseTime))
x(t) = r(t) × cos(t) × roseScale + 50
y(t) = r(t) × sin(t) × roseScale + 50

curves.name: Lissajous Drift
curves.description: Different sine frequencies on x and y make the path cross itself, creating drift patterns.

controls.label: Amplitude
controls.description: Base amplitude of the Lissajous curve — controls the overall size.

controls.label: Amp pulse
controls.description: Pulsing modulation on the amplitude — adds a breathing effect.

controls.label: a
controls.description: Frequency parameter "a" for the x-axis sine wave.

controls.label: b
controls.description: Frequency parameter "b" for the y-axis sine wave.

controls.label: Y scale
controls.description: Vertical scaling factor — stretches or compresses the y-axis.

curves.formula:
x(t) = (lissajousAmp + lissajousAmpBoost × sin(pulseTime)) × sin(lissajousAX × t + lissajousPhase) + 50
y(t) = x(t) × sin(lissajousBY × t) + 50

curves.name: Lemniscate Bloom
curves.description: The 1 + sin²t denominator pinches the center while preserving the figure-eight shape, creating a blooming infinity symbol.

controls.label: a
controls.description: The "a" parameter of the Bernoulli lemniscate — sets the size of the figure-eight.

controls.label: Pulse
controls.description: Sinusoidal pulse added to the radius — creates the blooming animation.

curves.formula:
r(t) = lemniscateA × cos(t) / (1 + sin²(t)) + lemniscateBoost × sin(pulseTime)
x(t) = r(t) × cos(t) + 50
y(t) = r(t) × sin(t) + 50

curves.name: Hypotrochoid Loop
curves.description: The rolling-circle terms create nested turns and offsets, so the trail draws spirograph-style loops.

controls.label: R
controls.description: Radius of the fixed outer circle in the rolling-circle spirograph.

controls.label: r
controls.description: Radius of the rolling inner circle — together with R determines the pattern.

controls.label: d
controls.description: Distance of the drawing point from the center of the rolling circle.

controls.label: Scale
controls.description: Overall scaling factor for the spirograph.

curves.formula:
x(t) = (spiroR - spiror) × cos(t) + spirod × cos((spiroR - spiror) / spiror × t)
y(t) = (spiroR - spiror) × sin(t) - spirod × sin((spiroR - spiror) / spiror × t)
x' = (x + spirodBoost × sin(pulseTime)) × spiroScale + 50
y' = (y + spirodBoost × sin(pulseTime)) × spiroScale + 50

curves.name: Three-Petal Spiral
curves.description: This rolling-circle setup resolves into three large looping petals, the breathing adds a gentle pulse.

controls.label: R
controls.description: Radius of the fixed outer circle.

controls.label: r
controls.description: Radius of the rolling inner circle.

controls.label: d
controls.description: Distance of the drawing point from the rolling circle center.

controls.label: Scale
controls.description: Overall scaling factor for the curve.

controls.label: Pulse
controls.description: Breathing modulation amplitude on the y-axis — adds a living pulse.

curves.formula:
x(t) = (spiralR - spiralr) × cos(t) + spirald × cos((spiralR - spiralr) / spiralr × t)
y(t) = (spiralR - spiralr) × sin(t) - spirald × sin((spiralR - spiralr) / spiralr × t) × (1 + spiralBreath × sin(pulseTime))
x' = x × spiralScale + 50
y' = y × spiralScale + 50

curves.name: Four-Petal Spiral
curves.description: Four-lobe spirograph pattern from R=4, r=1, d=3 — the breathing adds life to each petal.

controls.label: R
controls.description: Radius of the fixed outer circle.

controls.label: r
controls.description: Radius of the rolling inner circle.

controls.label: d
controls.description: Distance of the drawing point from the rolling circle center.

controls.label: Scale
controls.description: Overall scaling factor for the curve.

controls.label: Pulse
controls.description: Breathing modulation amplitude on the y-axis — adds a living pulse.

curves.formula:
x(t) = (spiralR - spiralr) × cos(t) + spirald × cos((spiralR - spiralr) / spiralr × t)
y(t) = (spiralR - spiralr) × sin(t) - spirald × sin((spiralR - spiralr) / spiralr × t) × (1 + spiralBreath × sin(pulseTime))
x' = x × spiralScale + 50
y' = y × spiralScale + 50

curves.name: Five-Petal Spiral
curves.description: Five-fold spirograph spiral — the breathing modulation gives each petal a living pulse.

controls.label: R
controls.description: Radius of the fixed outer circle.

controls.label: r
controls.description: Radius of the rolling inner circle.

controls.label: d
controls.description: Distance of the drawing point from the rolling circle center.

controls.label: Scale
controls.description: Overall scaling factor for the curve.

controls.label: Pulse
controls.description: Breathing modulation amplitude on the y-axis — adds a living pulse.

curves.formula:
x(t) = (spiralR - spiralr) × cos(t) + spirald × cos((spiralR - spiralr) / spiralr × t)
y(t) = (spiralR - spiralr) × sin(t) - spirald × sin((spiralR - spiralr) / spiralr × t) × (1 + spiralBreath × sin(pulseTime))
x' = x × spiralScale + 50
y' = y × spiralScale + 50

curves.name: Six-Petal Spiral
curves.description: Six-fold spirograph spiral — dense, symmetrical, with breathing modulation.

controls.label: R
controls.description: Radius of the fixed outer circle.

controls.label: r
controls.description: Radius of the rolling inner circle.

controls.label: d
controls.description: Distance of the drawing point from the rolling circle center.

controls.label: Scale
controls.description: Overall scaling factor for the curve.

controls.label: Pulse
controls.description: Breathing modulation amplitude on the y-axis — adds a living pulse.

curves.formula:
x(t) = (spiralR - spiralr) × cos(t) + spirald × cos((spiralR - spiralr) / spiralr × t)
y(t) = (spiralR - spiralr) × sin(t) - spirald × sin((spiralR - spiralr) / spiralr × t) × (1 + spiralBreath × sin(pulseTime))
x' = x × spiralScale + 50
y' = y × spiralScale + 50

curves.name: Butterfly Phase
curves.description: A rich butterfly curve with exponential decay creating delicate wings — phase animation adds depth.

controls.label: Turns
controls.description: Number of turns in the butterfly wing pattern — higher values add more detail.

controls.label: Scale
controls.description: Overall scaling factor for the butterfly curve.

controls.label: Pulse
controls.description: Breathing modulation amplitude — how much the butterfly expands and contracts.

controls.label: Cos weight
controls.description: Weight of the secondary cosine term — controls wing complexity.

controls.label: Power
controls.description: Power of the inner cosine modulation — affects wing pattern density.

curves.formula:
r(t) = e^cos(t) - 2cos(4×turns×t) + sin³t + butterflyCosWeight × cos(6×butterflyPower×t)
x(t) = r(t) × cos t × butterflyScale + 50
y(t) = r(t) × sin t × butterflyScale + 50
pulse = 1 + butterflyPulse × sin(pulseTime)

curves.name: Cardioid Glow
curves.description: A heart-shaped cardioid curve with breathing glow — the pulse modulation gives it life.

controls.label: a
controls.description: The "a" parameter in the cardioid equation — sets the base size.

controls.label: Pulse
controls.description: Amplitude of the breathing pulse — how much the cardioid expands and contracts.

controls.label: Scale
controls.description: Overall scaling factor for the cardioid.

curves.formula:
r(t) = cardioidA × (1 - cos(t)) × (1 + cardioidPulse × sin(pulseTime))
x(t) = r(t) × cos t × cardioidScale + 50
y(t) = r(t) × sin t × cardioidScale + 50

curves.name: Cardioid Heart
curves.description: The classic cardioid heart shape — the breathing adds a gentle pulse.

controls.label: a
controls.description: The "a" parameter in r = a(1+cosθ) — sets the size of the heart.

controls.label: Pulse
controls.description: Amplitude of the breathing pulse — how much the heart expands and contracts.

controls.label: Scale
controls.description: Overall scaling factor for the cardioid.

curves.formula:
r(t) = cardioidA × (1 + cos(t)) × (1 + cardioidPulse × sin(pulseTime))
x(t) = r(t) × cos t × cardioidScale + 50
y(t) = r(t) × sin t × cardioidScale + 50

curves.name: Heart Wave
curves.description: A wavy heart-shaped curve drawn by a parametric function — the wave amplitude adds organic motion.

controls.label: b
controls.description: The "b" parameter — scales the heart wave amplitude.

controls.label: Root span
controls.description: Span of the square root term — controls the heart tip sharpness.

controls.label: Wave amp
controls.description: Amplitude of the wave modulation — adds organic wavy motion.

controls.label: X scale
controls.description: Horizontal scaling factor.

controls.label: Y scale
controls.description: Vertical scaling factor.

curves.formula:
x(t) = heartWaveB × Sin(t) × √(|cos(t)|) / (Sin(t) + 1.4) × heartWaveScaleX + 50
y(t) = (heartWaveB × cos(t) - heartWaveB × sin(t) - 2 × cos(t) - √(|cos(t)|)) × heartWaveAmp × heartWaveScaleY + 50

curves.name: Spiral Search
curves.description: An expanding Archimedean spiral that sweeps outward — the pulse adds breathing motion to the turns.

controls.label: Turns
controls.description: Number of spiral turns — more turns create a denser spiral.

controls.label: Base radius
controls.description: Inner starting radius of the spiral.

controls.label: Radius amp
controls.description: Rate at which the radius expands per turn.

controls.label: Pulse
controls.description: Breathing modulation on the radius — adds a living pulse to the spiral.

controls.label: Scale
controls.description: Overall scaling factor for the spiral.

curves.formula:
r(t) = searchBaseRadius + searchRadiusAmp × t / (2π × searchTurns) + searchPulse × sin(pulseTime)
x(t) = r(t) × cos(t) × searchScale + 50
y(t) = r(t) × sin(t) × searchScale + 50

curves.name: Fourier Flow
curves.description: A sum of sine and cosine terms creating a complex flowing shape — the mix pulse modulates the phase.

controls.label: x cos1
controls.description: Coefficient of cos(t) in the x equation — primary horizontal harmonic.

controls.label: x cos3
controls.description: Coefficient of cos(3t) in the x equation — third harmonic.

controls.label: x sin5
controls.description: Coefficient of sin(5t) in the x equation — fifth harmonic.

controls.label: y sin1
controls.description: Coefficient of sin(t) in the y equation — primary vertical harmonic.

controls.label: y sin2
controls.description: Coefficient of sin(2t) in the y equation — second harmonic.

controls.label: y cos4
controls.description: Coefficient of cos(4t) in the y equation — fourth harmonic.

controls.label: Mix pulse
controls.description: Phase modulation pulse — adds organic variation to the shape.

curves.formula:
x(t) = fourierX1 × cos(t) + fourierX3 × cos(3t) + fourierX5 × sin(5t) + 50
y(t) = fourierY1 × sin(t) + fourierY2 × sin(2t) + fourierY4 × cos(4t) + 50
mix = fourierMixBase + fourierMixPulse × sin(pulseTime)
